case_title: DEMONTA HICHKS VS. MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-04-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HICHKS, DEMONTA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HICHKS, DEMONTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL -
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2012 - CONTINUED TO JUL-25-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HICHKS, DEMONTA AS TO DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY HICHKS, DEMONTA MERCY HOUSING MANAGEMENT GROUP, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY NANCY GAMBLE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.
